title: Password Managers
drDigitalIntro:
A password manager remembers all your passwords for you.
• You only have to remember one master password.
• It can create strong, unique passwords automatically.
• It stores them safely, encrypted. Let's practice a secure login.
drDigitalSuccess: You practiced a secure login! A password manager would fill these in automatically for you.
drDigitalHint: Type in the username and password fields, then click Login.
